title: Workshop: Build Heat-Alert Notification Preferences
summary: Workshop: Build Heat-Alert Notification Preferences retrieves prior skills in an original native checkbox radio and select preference panel scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css form layout, css form focus, css form native custom, css form autofill motion in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real native checkbox radio and select preference panel artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey form interface here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the resilient form design system here. */

options.text: Native checkbox radio and select preference panel case 1: a compact desktop form can be proportionally shrunk for touch screens.
Native checkbox radio and select preference panel case 1: design from content order and target needs, use intrinsic block layout, and verify no horizontal scrolling at narrow width and zoom.
Native checkbox radio and select preference panel case 1: use a transform scale on the entire form to create the mobile version.

options.text: Native checkbox radio and select preference panel case 3: custom checkboxes need only a hidden native input and decorative box.

Native checkbox radio and select preference panel case 3: replace select with a list of div elements because options are only visual rows.
